title: Better Mc Textures
description: This is an texture pack thats made minecraft better. Compact tools and items, boxed ores, lower fire shield, and more!
body:
# Better Mc Textures
## Why Better Mc Textures?
I know, there isnt any textures thats good and is in all versions of minecraft, so thats what i created. This has **boxed ores**, **shorted tools**, **lower fire** and **shield**, shows how much **bow pulls** and much more! **Download** it now for **better textures**. **Have fun**! :)

## Features
This texture pack have:
1. **Shorter Tools**!
2. **Boxed Ores**!
3. **Lower Fire** and **Shield**!
4. **Smaller Foods** and **Particles**!
5. Shows **Bow** and **Crossbow Stages of fire**!
6. **Transparent Pumking** and **Crystal**!

## Extra Info
**Have fun**!

**Support** me by **downloading** it!


If you got questions or problems **[join my discord server](https://discord.com/invite/ETTr37p38R)**!
